MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. PETITIONERs MORGAN STANLEY SMITH BARNEY, YVONNE LEGGE, ALISON KONOP and DAVID TUEBNER's Amended Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is Off calendar. Duplicate entry. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: Carol Haraburda CSR # 8052
